prompt:
Use the face and exact appearance of the man in the 
uploaded image as reference. Create an ultra premium whiskey brand advertisement for "REIGN" single malt.

Person wearing: Deep burgundy velvet blazer, crisp white shirt open one button, premium watch visible, sophisticated powerful look.

Pose: Sitting in a grand dark leather armchair, holding an oversized crystal whiskey glass with amber liquid, one leg crossed, completely dominant and relaxed expression.

Background: Rich dark mahogany library background with leather-bound books, large bold embossed gold serif typography "REIGN" filling background.

Product: Whiskey bottle shown bottom left corner with award medal badges visible.

Tagline bottom center in thin gold refined font:"For those who never settle for ordinary."

Top right watermark: Designed with GPT image 2

Floor: Dark polished oak wood reflective floor.

Lighting: Warm amber candlelight mood lighting,  deep rich masculine shadows, ultra cinematic.

Style: Macallan, Johnnie Walker Blue campaign level.

Quality: Ultra HD 8K photorealistic, portrait 3:4 ratio.
